# .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/documentation.md

---
name: 📚 Documentation Issue
about: Report an issue or suggest an improvement for the documentation.
title: "[DOCS] - Brief description of the documentation issue" # Pre-fills the issue title
labels: ["documentation", "needs-review"] # Add relevant labels
assignees: [] # Optional: Assign specific users
---

**1. Location of the Issue:**
> Please provide the URL or specific section(s) of the documentation where the issue exists.
> Example: `https://your-project-docs-url.com/page/section` or "The 'Installation' section in README.md"

**2. Description of the Issue:**
> What is wrong or missing in the documentation? Please be specific.
> (e.g., "The command shown is incorrect", "This section is unclear", "Information about X is missing")

**3. Suggested Improvement (Optional):**
> How could the documentation be improved? If you have specific text changes, please provide them.
> ```diff
> - Old Text
> + New Text
> ```

**4. Additional Information (Optional):**
> Add any other context, screenshots, or links relevant to the documentation issue here.
